title: Markham, Nick - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State, Department for Health and Social Care - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Chair, Evogenix Ltd  Lord Markham received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on taking up an appointment with Evogenix Ltd. The advice was provided in December 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month.  Non Executive Director, Penneys Gib Ltd  Lord Markham received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on taking up an appointment with Penneys Gib. The advice was provided in November 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Lord Markham before its closure. "
